rules.name: Specific Private Companies

rules.name: General Company with Suffix

rules.name: Specific Legal Entities
rules.description: Matches specific organization names found in the training data and failure cases, excluding the Finanzamt entries which are covered by the general rule.

rules.name: Specific Named Entities

rules.name: KG Company Suffix
rules.description: Matches company names ending in KG. Strictly excludes preceding prepositions like 'der', 'bei der', 'an die' to prevent over-matching.

rules.name: Specific Company Names
rules.description: Matches specific company names that do not fit the generic pattern or have specific capitalization/spacing issues.
rules.content: \b(?:Chen Setzekorn|Istvan Gerart|InnMarine GMBH|HochLebensmittel Holding GMBH|Ostgart AG)\b

rules.description: Matches company names ending in GmbH, AG, KG, etc., ensuring no preceding articles or prepositions are included by requiring a non-word boundary or specific delimiter before the name.

rules.name: WKO Acronym
rules.description: Matches WKO (Wirtschaftskammer Österreich) as a standalone entity.

rules.name: UFS with Location
rules.description: Matches UFS followed by a location (e.g., Salzburg), ensuring the full entity is captured but stopping before 'vom'.

rules.name: Tax Office Full Name with Location
rules.description: Matches Finanzamt followed by city names, strictly excluding non-entity contexts like 'Finanzamt am' or 'Finanzamt erliegende'.

rules.name: Amtes für Betrugsbekämpfung
rules.description: Matches the specific organization 'Amt für Betrugsbekämpfung' or its genitive form.

rules.name: Specific GmbH Names
rules.description: Matches specific GmbH names that were missed, including 'Schabetsberger Steuerberatung GmbH', 'Yoga Vidya GmbH', 'Hausverwaltung-GmbH', 'Berwaldkel-Möbel AG', 'Garanta VersicherungsAG', 'DA Deutsche Allgemeine Versicherung AG', 'AVED cosmetic', 'Geschenkartikel GmbH', 'B-GmbH', 'A-GmbH', 'X GmbH', 'UnterRecycling Services GMBH', 'Rhein Normonkel Manufaktur GMBH', 'Klein-Vorholt KI GMBH', 'Gogel Daten GMBH', 'London Film Acadamy'.

rules.name: Magistrate Genitive
rules.description: Matches Magistrates der Stadt Wien (genitive) and variations.
